summary: Iteration 22 - Darts Kiosk Runtime Fixes Testing. All backend tests PASSED (17/17). All frontend tests PASSED. Fixed document.title issue for Win32 window_manager identification. Code verification confirms: ignore_default_args=['--enable-automation'], window_manager integration, release package contents.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns healthy status
GET /api/boards/BOARD-1/session returns observer_browser_open, observer_state, observer_error fields
POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/unlock creates session and starts observer
Observer error on Linux is EXPECTED (Chrome not installed) - error state is 'error', browser_open=false
GET /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/overlay returns visible:true with credits when unlocked
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/simulate-game-start decrements credits correctly (3 → 2)
POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/simulate-game-end handles game end correctly
POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/lock closes session and resets observer state
GET /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/overlay returns visible:false when locked
CODE: autodarts_observer.py uses ignore_default_args=['--enable-automation']
CODE: autodarts_observer.py imports and calls hide_kiosk_window from window_manager
CODE: autodarts_observer.py imports and calls restore_kiosk_window in close_session
CODE: window_manager.py exists with hide_kiosk_window and restore_kiosk_window functions
RELEASE: Windows package contains window_manager.py with required functions
RELEASE: Windows package contains autodarts_observer.py with automation fix
RELEASE: Windows package contains credits_overlay.py
RELEASE: darts-kiosk-v1.0.0-windows.zip exists (2.06 MB)
FRONTEND: Locked screen renders correctly at /kiosk/BOARD-1
FRONTEND: Observer fallback screen shows when unlocked (Chrome not available on Linux)
FRONTEND: document.title set to 'DartsKiosk' for Win32 window identification (FIXED)
FRONTEND: Fallback screen has retry (observer-retry-btn), call-staff (fallback-call-staff-btn), end-session (fallback-end-session-btn) buttons
FRONTEND: Overlay page /overlay/BOARD-1 shows 'SPIELE ÜBRIG 3' when session active
FRONTEND: Overlay page transparent/hidden when board is locked
seed_data_creation: Board BOARD-1 unlocked with 3 credits, game simulated, then locked for final state verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested runtime fixes for Windows PC deployment. KEY FIXES: 1) autodarts_observer.py uses ignore_default_args=['--enable-automation'] to remove Chrome automation banner. 2) window_manager.py integrates hide_kiosk_window() on session start and restore_kiosk_window() on session end for Win32. 3) Frontend document.title FIXED to stay 'DartsKiosk' on /kiosk/* routes (was being overwritten by SettingsContext branding name). This is critical for window_manager to find the kiosk window. On Linux preview env without Chrome, observer will fail with 'Chromium distribution chrome not found' - this is EXPECTED. The release package darts-kiosk-v1.0.0-windows.zip includes all required files.

window_manager_integration.hide_on_launch: hide_kiosk_window() called after Chrome launches successfully

stable_document_title.fix_applied: SettingsContext now skips title override on /kiosk/* routes
stable_document_title.kiosk_title: DartsKiosk (used by window_manager for Win32 EnumWindows)

key_implementation_verified.profile_reuse_logging: REUSING vs NEW profile status logged at browser launch
key_implementation_verified.release_package: darts-kiosk-v1.0.0-windows.zip verified to contain window_manager.py, autodarts_observer.py, credits_overlay.py

fixes_applied_by_testing_agent.change: Updated useEffect to set document.title='DartsKiosk' AFTER settingsLoading completes
Added check to NOT override document.title on /kiosk/* routes
